name: vscode-f-flat-minor
description: Syntax highlighting and language support for f-flat-minor, a minimal stack-oriented programming language

scripts.compile: npm run sync-core-vocab && npm run bundle-ers && tsc -p .

f-flat-minor.ersScript.description: Optional absolute path to the ERS entry script (`ers.ts` from the f-flat-minor repo, or a pre-bundled `ers-cli.mjs`). When empty, the extension uses its bundled CLI or searches upward from the open file / workspace folders for `node/bin/ers.ts`.

f-flat-minor.ersOutputFormat.description: ERS audit output in the output panel: plain text (same as `ers audit` without `--json`) or pretty-printed JSON (`-j`).

f-flat-minor.ersHover.description: When true, hovering a definition name (`word:`) shows ERS body, safety verdict, and reasons (runs `ers audit --word … --json`).

f-flat-minor.coreVocabHover.description: When true, hovering a core/primitive token shows mnemonic, opcode, stack effect, and description (from embedded `_shared/core-vocabulary.json`, web-inspector style).

f-flat-minor.execFileMaxBufferMb.markdownDescription: Per-stream cap (MiB) for `stdout` and `stderr` when the extension runs Node subprocesses (`ff-run`, ERS). JSONL trace output is written to stderr, so long traces can exceed small defaults. Applied separately to each stream. Increase for very long traces; lower if memory is a concern.

f-flat-minor.traceRunTimeoutSeconds.markdownDescription: Hard timeout in seconds for each `ff-run` subprocess launched by the trace viewer. When exceeded, the extension terminates the process and reports a timeout error.
